allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest init --template vite --base radix --preset base-nova -y --force --css-variables)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest init --template vite --base radix --preset nova -y --force --css-variables)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add input form card dialog toast badge label select textarea -y --overwrite)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add input form card dialog badge label select textarea sonner -y --overwrite)
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; ['@tailwindcss/vite', '@vitejs/plugin-react'].forEach\(k => console.log\(k, deps[k]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "try { require.resolve\('@tailwindcss/vite'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not found:', e.code\) }")

Bash(node -e "try { require.resolve\('vitest'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not found'\) }; try { require.resolve\('@testing-library/jest-dom'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('@testing-library/jest-dom not found'\) }; try { require.resolve\('@testing-library/react'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('@testing-library/react not found'\) }; try { require.resolve\('jsdom'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('jsdom not found'\) }")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const entry=l.packages['node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('vitest resolved version:', entry?.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); ['react-router-dom','zod','react-hook-form','@hookform/resolvers','leaflet','react-leaflet'].forEach\(p => { const e=l.packages['node_modules/'+p]; console.log\(p, e?.version\) }\)")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const e=l.packages['node_modules/react-router-dom']; console.log\('react-router-dom peer deps:', JSON.stringify\(e?.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const e=l.packages['node_modules/zod']; console.log\('zod major:', e?.version, JSON.stringify\(e?.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const e=l.packages['node_modules/@hookform/resolvers']; console.log\('@hookform/resolvers peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(e?.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const e=l.packages['node_modules/next-themes']; console.log\('next-themes:', e?.version, JSON.stringify\(e?.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({dependencies: p.dependencies, devDependencies: p.devDependencies}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(k+': '+v for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['leaflet','react-leaflet','zod','react-hook-form','@hookform','lucide','sonner','shadcn']\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({n: z.coerce.number\(\)}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s._def\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {zodResolver} = require\('@hookform/resolvers/zod'\); const {z} = require\('zod'\); console.log\(typeof zodResolver\)")
